error_signature: fields id and name not excluded due to invisible characters
title: Invisible characters causing fields to be included in comparison
symptom: The Compare node includes fields in the comparison that are supposed to be excluded, due to invisible characters in their names.
applies_when: Fields are set to be excluded from comparison
not_this_if: Fields are correctly excluded without invisible characters
root_cause: Invisible characters in field names can prevent the Compare node from recognizing them as excluded. This can occur if the data source contains non-visible Unicode characters that are not easily detectable.
fix_steps: Use an invisible character viewer to identify hidden characters in the field names.
Remove the invisible characters from the field names in your dataset.
Alternatively, add both the original field names and their versions with invisible characters to the skip list in the Compare node.
agent_instruction: Identify and remove invisible characters from the field names or adjust the skip list accordingly.
